title: Fix GoJS Evaluation Watermark After Library Upgrade
description:
## Bug
The ERD diagram displayed the GoJS evaluation watermark despite having a paid license. The watermark appeared after upgrading to GoJS 3.0.

## Root Cause
The GoJS license key is version-specific. After upgrading to GoJS 3.0, the existing license key was no longer valid for the new version. A new key needed to be requested from GoJS.

## Fix
Requested a new GoJS license key compatible with version 3.0 and applied it to the application. The evaluation watermark was removed.
acceptance_criteria: GoJS evaluation watermark is not displayed in the ERD
GoJS 3.0 license key is properly configured
ERD diagram renders without watermark in production
ux_changes: Removed GoJS evaluation watermark from the ERD diagram.
implementation_notes: GoJS license keys are version-specific. After upgrading to GoJS 3.0, the old key stopped working. A new key was requested and applied. Ensure license key is updated whenever GoJS is upgraded.
comment_summary: Developer identified the license was being applied but was for a different GoJS version. A new key was requested for GoJS 3.0 and the watermark was resolved.
